Camp: Home — Full Character List

Main Characters.

  2. Rowan Hale

    • Species: Deer (Elk)

    • Age: 24

    • Gender: Male

    • Sexual Orientation: Bisexual

    • Appearance: Tall and slender, warm brown fur, short antlers with velvet marks, soft dark eyes. Usually wears flannel shirts and hiking boots. Calm, steady movements.

  4. Mika Torres

    • Species: Fox

    • Age: 21

    • Gender: Male

    • Sexual Orientation: Pansexual

    • Appearance: Bright rust-red fur with darker ear tips, sharp grin, expressive tail. Wears tank tops, shorts, fingerless gloves, and always has a portable CD player.

  6. Juniper “June” Kline

    • Species: Wolf

    • Age: 23

    • Gender: Female

    • Sexual Orientation: Lesbian

    • Appearance: Gray-and-white fur, athletic build, sharp amber eyes. Wears cargo shorts, boots, and a faded band tee. Often carries a notebook.

  8. Ellis Brook

    • Species: Raccoon / Otter

    • Age: 25

    • Gender: Male

    • Sexual Orientation:

    • Appearance: Medium build, dark facial mask, neatly kept fur, gentle smile. Wears camp staff shirts, khakis, and a wristwatch. Always looks well-rested.

  10. Director Alistair Crowe

    • Species: Crow / Raven

    • Age: Unknown

    • Gender: Male

    • Sexual Orientation: Heterosexual

    • Appearance: Tall, black-feathered, silver streaks around the eyes and beak. Wears a pressed vest, tie, and long coat regardless of weather. Unblinking gaze.
